Terms of Use

Last updated: August 15, 2025

1. AGREEMENT AND DEFINITIONS

1.1 Agreement Overview

Welcome to my Terms of Service! This document forms a legal agreement ("Agreement") between you ("User") and Sasha Navruzova ("Provider") governing the use of this portfolio website and any associated services. By utilizing this website, you affirm your acceptance of these terms.

1.2 Terms and Definitions

  • Effective Date: The initiation date of this Agreement.
  • User Content: Refers to any content created or uploaded by the User.
  • Website: The portfolio website designed for your viewing.
  • Device: Your computer, mobile phone, tablet, or other applicable gadgets.
  • Services: Various features offered by the website.

2. SERVICES

Provider grants you a license to use the website for personal use. Services include portfolio viewing, app information, and contact forms. All services are provided at no cost.

3. AUTHORIZATION

Provider authorizes your access to and use of the website. Users acknowledge that the Provider processes personal data in accordance with the privacy policy.

4. CONTENT

Users retain rights to User Content and grant the Provider a license to use, store, and process such content. Users are responsible for the legality of User Content, and the Provider is not liable for the loss of such content.

5. USER RESTRICTIONS

Users must use the website within legal and contractual limits, refraining from copying, revealing, or creating unauthorized software. The website must not be used for illegal or harmful content.

6. PROVIDER'S AND USER'S OBLIGATIONS

The Provider ensures services are performed with reasonable skill. Users must comply with applicable laws and regulations.

7. TERM AND TERMINATION

The terms commence on the Effective Date. Termination may occur at the discretion of either User or Provider for various reasons, and upon termination, access to services ceases.

8. FEES; PAYMENT TERMS

All services are provided free of charge. No payment is required for accessing this portfolio website.

9. LIABILITY

The website is provided "as is," with the Provider disclaiming warranties. The Provider is not responsible for User Content or website availability. Users indemnify the Provider for any claims and damages, and the Provider's liability is limited.

10. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION

These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, in compliance with European Union regulations.

11. DATA PROTECTION

This website complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable EU data protection laws. For detailed information about data processing, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

12. FINAL PROVISIONS

The relationship is that of independent contractors. Information processing is per the Privacy Policy. The Provider reserves the right to interrupt services for maintenance. These terms constitute the entire agreement.
